revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Hirawoka Shrine former site
| native_name = 枚岡神社 旧社地
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Hirawoka Shrine former site
| coordinates = {{coord|36.07046|136.237453}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Hirawoka Shrine former site'''|枚岡神社 旧社地}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echizen Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha Former Site|lt=Shikinaisha Former Site|qid=Q135207684|1=Shikinaisha Former Site}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11636413|ltq=Q11636413|qid=Q11636413|1=List of Shikinaisha in Echizen Province}}
** Series ordinal: 99
** P155: {{ill|Kiheno Shrine|lt=Kiheno Shrine|qid=Q135040240|1=Kiheno Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135040243|ltq=Q135040243|qid=Q135040243|1=Ketanino Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q1047144|ltq=Q1047144|qid=Q1047144|1=Echizen Province}}
* {{ill|Sakai District, Fukui|lt=Sakai district|en|Sakai District, Fukui|ja|坂井郡|zh|坂井郡|qid=Q7402764|1=Sakai District, Fukui}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|36.07046|136.237453}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 182286
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Q135040242|ltq=Q135040242|qid=Q135040242|1=Hirawoka Shrine}}
** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
